title: No Ender Shulks
description: Disable items from going in ender chests or disable them entirely
body:
Works serverside

Limit ender chest storage space by disallowing shulker boxes from going in ender chests. 

Any items with the item tag `noendershulks:cannot_place_in_ender_chest` will not go in. 

Alternatively they can be disabled entirely with `/gamerule noendershulks_canOpenEnderChests`
